parameters.content:
## SA_Knowledge_Base_Save Workflow

Webhook-triggered workflow for saving user knowledge to Neon Postgres.
Called from Agent Settings page (frontend).

### Accepts:
- type: 'text' → Custom instructions (direct text)
- type: 'file' → File URL (Supabase Storage) → calls backend to extract text

### Flow:
1. Receive webhook: { user_id, agent_id, type, content/file_url, file_name, category }
2. Route by type (text vs file)
3. For text: chunk if needed, output items
4. For files: call backend /api/file/extract-text → get pre-chunked text
5. Output one item per chunk (with file_name and file_url metadata)
6. Generate embedding per chunk (OpenRouter text-embedding-3-small)
7. INSERT each chunk into user_vector_knowledge_base (Neon)
8. Return success response

### Chunking:
- Backend returns pre-chunked text (~1500 chars, 200 overlap)
- Text input chunked in n8n if > 1500 chars
- Each chunk = separate row in DB with its own embedding

### Backend extracts: PDF, DOCX, JSON, TXT, MD
### Table: user_vector_knowledge_base
Columns: user_id, document, category, embedding, source, file_name, file_url

parameters.query:
INSERT INTO public.user_vector_knowledge_base (user_id, document, category, embedding, source, file_name, file_url)
VALUES (
  '{{ $('Merge Paths').item.json.user_id }}',
  '{{ $('Merge Paths').item.json.document.replace(/'/g, "''").replace(/\n/g, ' ') }}',
  '{{ $('Merge Paths').item.json.category }}',
  '{{ JSON.stringify($json.data[0].embedding) }}',
  '{{ $('Merge Paths').item.json.source }}',
  '{{ $('Merge Paths').item.json.file_name || null }}',
  '{{ $('Merge Paths').item.json.file_url || null }}'
)
RETURNING id;
